title: hieracium pseudohumile
intro: Hieracium pseudohumile, also known as Hieracium humile or small hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that grows in rocky and dry areas. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pseudohumile include potential uses in treating skin conditions, wound healing, and as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pseudohumile are typically made from the dried aerial parts of the plant, which can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
